channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: May's top PlayStation games by copies sold - The Alinea Insight newsletter
item.description:
1. May's top PlayStation games by copies sold  The Alinea Insight newsletter

  4. James Bond Reboot Is Officially One of the Franchise's Best as It Ties With the Greatest 007 Movie of All Time  MovieWeb
  5. 007 First Light Estimated to Have Sold 2.2 Million Copies, Generating $150 Million in Revenue  IGN

item.title: Control Resonant Early Access Is Exclusive To PS5, But At Least We Get 'Play Anywhere' On Xbox - Pure Xbox
item.description:
1. Control Resonant Early Access Is Exclusive To PS5, But At Least We Get 'Play Anywhere' On Xbox  Pure Xbox

  4. Remedy’s Control sequel launches in September  The Verge
  5. Control Resonant finally gets an exciting release date update  Polygon.com

item.title: Ultrahuman says hackers accessed customers’ wellness data via internal tool - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Ultrahuman says hackers accessed customers’ wellness data via internal tool  TechCrunch
  2. Ultrahuman says recent security breach didn’t affect passwords or credit cards  9to5Google
  3. Ultrahuman Data Breach: 68 Days to Tell Users  the5krunner
  4. Ultrahuman hit by breach, says hackers accessed users' wellness data | The breach took place on March 27 | Inshorts  Inshorts
  5. Ultrahuman Advises Customers of a Security Incident  Wifi Hifi Magazine
